payload.answer: The proposal appears too broad for a single conversation_summary card. Consider one of these repair options instead.
citations: LLM proposal - one conversation_summary card containing an entire 8000 word transcript
repair_options: Split the transcript into smaller, topic-based memory cards instead of one summary card.
Create a concise conversation_summary that captures only durable high-level takeaways.
Keep the full transcript out of memory and store only a short summary if persistent storage is desired.
If the transcript contains multiple distinct facts, preserve them as separate candidate memories rather than merging them into one card.
